risinfo.chaptertitle: Appendix II. Test Your Knowledge! Answer Key

listitem.para: b. Codes 90460-90461 and 96380 require counseling by a physician or other QHP. Counseling is not required to support codes 90471-90474 or 90480, although counseling is included in code 90480, when provided.

d. Report code 90482 for at least 3 minutes of counseling for one or more immunizations that are not administered in the physician's or QHP's practice on the date of counseling. Code 90482 includes up to 10 minutes of counseling. For more than 10 minutes of counseling, see code 90484.

b. False. Codes 90482-90484 may be reported when immunization counseling is provided for multiple immunizations and some, but not all, immunizations are administered. Do not include the time spent counseling for administered immunizations (reported with any IA code) in the time reported with codes 90482-90484.

The appropriate ICD-10-CM code for the infant's routine child health examination (eg, Z00.129) is reported in conjunction with 96161. Depression screening codes (Z13.31 or Z13.32) are not appropriate for maternal screening for the benefit of the infant.

Behavior change interventions involve validated interventions provided to either a new or an established patient who has a behavior often considered an illness itself. Specific time requirements are included in the code descriptors, so the midpoint rule is not applicable to 99406–99408.
